generated_assessment.reasoning: The exposure highlighted practical difficulties with strategic autonomy, nudging opinion toward skepticism but not full reversal.

request_payload.exposure_text: Just saw this in my local news feed - our town's emergency preparedness drill last month was a total mess. The new 'strategic autonomy' rules meant we had to rely on local resources only, and it took forever to get basic supplies organized. Meanwhile, neighboring towns with traditional alliances had everything running smoothly. Why are we making things harder on ourselves? #CommonSenseFirst #LocalFirst
